tasks.title: Dispatcher.SendToRecipient + 5 strategies + strategy resolver (S2-01)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-contact-aware-dispatcher/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/contact-dispatcher.feature} AND spec/002-unified-directory/design.md for the dispatch_policy schema. SECOND: extend internal/engine/dispatcher.go with SendToRecipient(ref RecipientRef, opts SendOptions) SendResult. (REQ-200..207) implement 5 strategies. (REQ-202) strategy resolver: caller→contact→group→precedence-default→global default. (REQ-218) SendResult includes delivery_ids/bearers_attempted/strategy_used/precedence_used. Integration test covering all 5 strategies + failover paths.

tasks.title: POST /api/messages/send-to-contact endpoint + per-bearer status response (S2-02)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-contact-aware-dispatcher/{requirements.md, acceptance/contact-dispatcher.feature}. SECOND: implement internal/api/messages_send_to_contact.go. (REQ-208) accept {contact_id, body, precedence?, strategy_override?} via readJSON; resolve contact via directory.Store; call Dispatcher.SendToRecipient; return SendResult. (REQ-209) on 0-reachable-bearers, return 503 with per_bearer_status[] breakdown. (REQ-210) leave POST /api/messages/send unchanged. Add @Summary/@Tags/@Router. Tests cover happy + unreachable + invalid contact + strategy_override.

tasks.title: Precedence-aware queue + FLASH preemption + audit + Prometheus counter (S2-03)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-contact-aware-dispatcher/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/contact-dispatcher.feature}. SECOND: modify internal/engine/delivery_worker.go processBatch SELECT to ORDER BY precedence DESC, queued_at ASC (REQ-211). (REQ-212) on saturated interface AND Flash/Override arrival, evict the lowest-precedence queued item to queue tail + write audit event delivery.preempted with evicted ID. (REQ-213) increment meshsat_delivery_preempted_total{evicted_precedence}. Deterministic test on the ordering + preemption logic.

tasks.title: First-boot seed of 6 precedence-default policies + Hub-tenant overrides + 30-day key grace (S2-04, S2-05)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-contact-aware-dispatcher/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: (REQ-214) on first boot after this phase, INSERT 6 rows into directory_dispatch_policy with scope_type="default" mapping each precedence to its strategy per the table in design.md. Idempotent: skip if already present. (REQ-215) hubreporter directory_push handler from spec/002 T-003 applies tenant-scoped dispatch_policy overrides on top. (REQ-216/217) transform pipeline dual-read: contact-key preferred over sms-key; WARN log on sms fallback after 30 days (env MESHSAT_CONTACT_KEY_GRACE_DAYS); error after 60 days. Tests cover seeding + override + dual-read behavior.
